Documentation dĂ©veloppeur
GeometryServiceBaseT.h
1 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_GEOMETRY_IMPL_GEOMETRYSERVICEBASET_H
2 #define ARCGEOSIM_GEOMETRY_IMPL_GEOMETRYSERVICEBASET_H
3 
4 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/Impl/GeometryTemplatesT.h"
5 
6 template<typename GeometryT>
7 void
8 GeometryServiceBase::
9 updateGroup(ItemGroup group, GeometryT & geometry)
10 {
11  PropertyMap::iterator igroup = m_group_property_map.find(group.internal());
12  if (igroup == m_group_property_map.end())
13  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Undefined ItemGroup property");
14 
15  bool need_recompute = false;
16  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & properties = igroup->second;
17  for(typename ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfos::iterator i = properties.storages.begin(); i != properties.storages.end(); ++i)
18  {
19  IGeometryProperty::eProperty property = i->first;
20  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = i->second;
21 
22  if (!checkNeedUpdate(group,property,storage))
23  {
24  if (group.isAllItems())
25  traceMng()->debug(Trace::High) << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " is already computed for group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name();
26  else
27  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " is already computed for group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name();
28  continue; // skip that property
29  }
30  else
31  {
32  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " will be computed for group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name();
33  _checkItemGroupPropertyUsage(group, property, IGeometryProperty::PVariable, storage.usageVarCount, storage.externStorage, storage.storageType);
34  _checkItemGroupPropertyUsage(group, property, IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap, storage.usageMapCount, storage.externStorage, storage.storageType);
35  need_recompute = true;
36  }
37 
38  // Mise en place des allocations
39  if (IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property))
40  {
41  std::shared_ptr<RealVariable> & ivar = storage.realVar;
42  if (not ivar and (storage.storageType & IGeometryProperty::PVariable))
43  {
44  ivar = buildPropertyVariableT<Real>(group, property);
45  }
46 
47  std::shared_ptr<RealGroupMap> & imap = storage.realMap;
48  if (not imap and (storage.storageType & IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap))
49  {
50  imap.reset(new RealGroupMap(group));
51  traceMng()->debug() << "Building Map " << imap->name() << " on " << group.fullName();
52  }
53  }
54  else
55  {
56  ARCANE_ASSERT((IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property)),("Vectorial property expected"));
57  std::shared_ptr<Real3Variable> & ivar = storage.real3Var;
58  if (not ivar and (storage.storageType & IGeometryProperty::PVariable))
59  {
60  ivar = buildPropertyVariableT<Real3>(group, property);
61  }
62 
63  std::shared_ptr<Real3GroupMap> & imap = storage.real3Map;
64  if (not imap and (storage.storageType & IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap))
65  {
66  imap.reset(new Real3GroupMap(group));
67  traceMng()->debug() << "Building Map " << imap->name() << " on " << group.fullName();
68  }
69  }
70  }
71 
72  if (need_recompute)
73  {
74  GenericGSInternalUpdater<GeometryT> updater(geometry,
75  traceMng(),
76  &properties,
77  this);
78  group.applyOperation(&updater);
79  }
80 
81  /*** L'affectation générale est désormais faite dans GeometryTemplatesT ***/
82 }
83 
84 
85 template<typename UniqGeometryMap, typename SharedGeometryMap>
86 void
87 GeometryServiceBase::
88 unregisterMesh(UniqGeometryMap & uniq_geometry, SharedGeometryMap & shared_geometry, IMesh * mesh)
89 {
90  const bool isUniqMesh = (mesh->parentMesh() == NULL);
91 
92  if (isUniqMesh)
93  {
94  typename UniqGeometryMap::iterator finder = uniq_geometry.find(mesh);
95  if (finder != uniq_geometry.end())
96  {
97  delete finder->second;
98  }
99  uniq_geometry.erase(finder);
100 
101  for(PropertyMap::iterator i = m_group_property_map.begin(); i != m_group_property_map.end(); /* incr inside the loop */)
102  {
103  PropertyMap::iterator candidate_to_deletion = i++; // incr of main loop
104  if (candidate_to_deletion->first->mesh() == mesh)
105  m_group_property_map.erase(candidate_to_deletion);
106  }
107  }
108  else
109  {
110  typename SharedGeometryMap::iterator finder = shared_geometry.find(mesh);
111  if (finder != shared_geometry.end())
112  {
113  delete finder->second.first;
114  delete finder->second.second;
115  }
116  shared_geometry.erase(finder);
117 
118  for(PropertyMap::iterator i = m_group_property_map.begin(); i != m_group_property_map.end(); /* incr inside the loop */)
119  {
120  PropertyMap::iterator candidate_to_deletion = i++; // incr of main loop
121  if (candidate_to_deletion->first->mesh() == mesh)
122  m_group_property_map.erase(candidate_to_deletion);
123  }
124  }
125 }
126 
127 template<typename T>
128 std::shared_ptr<ItemVariableScalarRefT<T> >
129 GeometryServiceBase::
130 buildPropertyVariableT(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)
131 {
132  typedef ItemVariableScalarRefT<T> VarT;
133  String varName = IGeometryProperty::name(property)+String("Of")+group.name()+m_suffix;
134  traceMng()->debug() << "Building Variable " << varName << " on " << group.fullName();
135  return std::shared_ptr<VarT>(new VarT(VariableBuildInfo(group.mesh(),
136  varName,
137  group.itemFamily()->name(),
138  IVariable::PPrivate|IVariable::PNoRestore),
139  group.itemKind()));
140 }
141 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_GEOMETRY_IMPL_GEOMETRYSERVICEBASET_H */
